metadata.name: construkt
metadata.description: Construkt Solana escrow and approval engine

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Signer is not authorized for this action

errors.name: RoleAlreadyInRequestedState
errors.msg: Role assignment is already in the requested active state

errors.name: ApproverRoleConflict
errors.msg: Wallet already has the opposing approver role for this work package

errors.name: InvalidStatus
errors.msg: Account or request status is invalid for this action

errors.name: ContractorCannotApprove
errors.msg: Contractor cannot approve their own request

errors.name: InvalidRequestId
errors.msg: Payment request id does not match the next request counter

errors.name: ActiveRequestExists
errors.msg: An active request already exists for this work package

errors.name: WrongMint
errors.msg: Token mint does not match expected mint

errors.name: WrongTokenOwner
errors.msg: Token account owner does not match expected owner

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: HighApprovalRequired
errors.msg: Package requires high approval before release
